mapper.sql: id, activity_name, location, activity_date, morning_quota, afternoon_quota, morning_remaining, afternoon_remaining, status, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blood_activity WHERE activity_date >= CURDATE() AND status != '已结束' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY activity_date ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE blood_activity SET morning_remaining = morning_remaining - 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{activityId} AND activity_date >= CURDATE() AND status != '已结束' AND morning_remaining > 0 AND deleted = 0

UPDATE blood_activity SET afternoon_remaining = afternoon_remaining - 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{activityId} AND activity_date >= CURDATE() AND status != '已结束' AND afternoon_remaining > 0 AND deleted = 0
UPDATE blood_activity SET morning_remaining = morning_remaining + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{activityId} AND morning_remaining < morning_quota AND deleted = 0
UPDATE blood_activity SET afternoon_remaining = afternoon_remaining + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{activityId} AND afternoon_remaining < afternoon_quota AND deleted = 0
